name: drug-interaction-alert
title: Drug Interaction Alert
description: Severity-tiered interaction banner with a four-bar escalation meter and collapsible management advice.

props.name: drugs
props.description: The interacting pair, e.g. ["Warfarin", "Aspirin"], or a single node.

props.name: detail
props.description: Collapsible clinical detail behind the "Management advice" toggle.

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Honoured only for minor/moderate — major/contraindicated are non-dismissible.

clinicalNotes: Dismissibility is tiered by design: minor and moderate alerts can be dismissed (they use role="status"), while major and contraindicated cannot and use role="alert" so assistive tech announces them immediately — alert fatigue is real, but the top tiers must not be swipeable. Severity is conveyed redundantly: text label, icon shape, escalation-meter bar count, and tone. The component renders the alert; interaction detection and severity grading belong to your drug-knowledge source (e.g. a formulary API).
notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths. Collapsible animation classes come from tw-animate-css.
